location.heading: 4 tips and tricks for creating compelling training videos using screen recorders

findings.sentence: Even though screen casts focus on action, our brains are [wired](https://wistia.com/learn/marketing/power-of-faces-in-video) to look at faces, so when a presenter shows in an instructional video, we spend [30%](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0360131519302660) of the time looking at their face.
